en: No, I am Harry Stiles, yeah. Well, if you're Harry Stiles, then where's the rest of One Direction?
ko: 그럼 해리 스타일스라면 원 디렉션은 어디 있죠?

en: I don't always travel with One Direction. I'm doing like a solo thing now.
ko: 항상 원 디렉션과 함께 여행하는 건 아니에요.

en: Oh, you're doing the solo thing. Yeah, how did that work out for Justin Timberlake?
Really well, actually. Fine. You want proof I'm Harry Stiles?
Oh, gosh. All right, you really are Harry Stiles.
Hey. Oh my gosh, please, just go right through. Mr. Stiles.
ko: 오, 세상에. 그냥 지나가세요, 스타일스 씨. 감사합니다. 해리, 좋은 하루 되세요.

en: Thank you. Harry. Have a good day. Okay, you too. I'm having a great day.
Excuse me, sir, I need to see your ID.
My ID? I don't have any ID, but I'm James Corden. I'm the host of the Late Late Show.
ko: 신분증이요? 신분증은 없는데, 저는 제임스 코든이에요.
